items.title: Lyse Doucet: Under fragile ceasefire, Iranians wonder if US deal can be done

items.summary: The fire has deepened fears over the nation's petrol supplies amid a global crunch.

items.summary: Donald Trump's threat marks the latest escalation in his ongoing spat with Jerome Powell.

items.summary: The lawsuit said the firm's practices had led to higher ticket prices and worse service for customers.

items.summary: The Israeli Prison Service says the allegation that Barghouti was subjected to physical violence by prison guards are "false and baseless".

items.summary: Zhang Kequn was arrested in March while trying to travel to China with more than 2,000 live ants.

items.title: Back to books - Sweden's schools cutting back on digital learning

items.summary: Southern Indian leaders urge mass mobilisation over concerns about redrawing electoral boundaries.
